name: @opsa/web
description: Frontend MF0 da OPSA em React, Vite e TypeScript.

scripts.test:mf7: npm run test:mf7:browser-compatibility && npm run check:mf7:frontend-modules && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test:mf8: npm run test:mf8:formatters && npm run typecheck && npm run build
scripts.test:final:prepare: npm run test:mf1 && npm run test:mf2 && npm run test:mf3 && npm run test:mf5:feedback && npm run test:mf5:responsive && npm run test:mf5:a11y && npm run test:mf5:forms && npm run test:mf5:errors && npm run test:mf5:performance && npm run test:mf7 && npm run test:mf8
